title: Fleet Dashboard Job Summary + Benchmark Targets
summary: Machine cards now summarize 3+ identical jobs into a single compact line, and benchmark job names include the --targets arg so parallel experiments are distinguishable.

features.title: Compact Job Summary in Machine Cards
features.summary: Machine cards with 3+ jobs show a summary line instead of listing each process individually.
features.description: When a machine is running 3+ CPU jobs (e.g., garage-pc with 11 parallel benchmarks), the machine card now shows a compact summary like '12 CPU jobs -- 1 synth:C3_nn + 11 bench:gbdt/full/pnl_call' instead of listing each one individually. Machines with 1-2 jobs still show the full per-process detail. The detailed Currently Running table below is unchanged for when you need per-job info.

features.title: Benchmark Job Names Include Target
features.summary: Benchmark jobs now show which --targets arg they're running, turning 'bench:gbdt/full' into 'bench:gbdt/full/pnl_call'.
features.description: The fleet collector's script name parser now extracts the --targets argument from benchmark commands. This turns generic names like 'bench:gbdt/full' into specific ones like 'bench:gbdt/full/pnl_call' or 'bench:gbdt/full/otm30', so you can tell parallel experiments apart on the dashboard. Updated on both GPU machines and the Mac orchestrator.
